creator: jclarke@cisco.com
text:
New port of xbomber.  It's a Super Bomberman-like game for X with 100
levels, color and sound.  It was written by Bill Kendrick, and got
Jordan's eye some time ago.  Sorry to keep you waiting so long, Jordan. 

The port can be found in /pub/FreeBSD/incoming on the FreeBSD ftp site.
The name of the file is xbomber.tar.gz.
